message:
🌱 Add opencost: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Provider implementation mission (#1412)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opencost-2221-oracle-cloud-infrastructure-oci-provider-implementation",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opencost: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Provider implementation",
+    "description": "Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Provider implementation. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opencost deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opencost version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nhelm list -n opencost 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opencost installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opencost configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opencost configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nkubectl get configmap -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opencost\n```\nCreate a new OCI provider implementation, so OpenCost may be used to estimate costs for workloads that run in OCI. This will benefit OCI customers or hybrid cloud users of OCI, and increase usage of OpenCost."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Provider implementation",
+        "description": "Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) provider\n---------\n\n## What does this PR change?\n* Adds a new cloud service provider implementation for OCI.\n\n## Does this PR relate to any other PRs?\n* N/A\n\n## How will this PR impact users?\n* Users running clusters on OCI will be able to access pricing data.\n\n## Does this PR address any GitHub or Zendesk issues?\n* Closes #2221 \n\n## How was this PR tested?\n* Tested on OCI with OKE and self-managed clusters.\n\n## Does this PR require changes to documentation?\n*\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nkubectl get events -n opencost --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Provider implementation\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) provider\n---------\n\n## What does this PR change?\n* Adds a new cloud service provider implementation for OCI.\n\n## Does this PR relate to any other PRs?\n* N/A\n\n## How will this PR impact users?\n* Users running clusters on OCI will be able to access pricing data.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "opencost",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
